name: Michel Legrand
abstract: Michel Jean Legrand (French pronunciation: [miʃɛl ləɡʁɑ̃]; 24 February 1932 – 26 January 2019) was a French musical composer, arranger, conductor, jazz pianist, and singer. Legrand was a prolific composer, having written more than 200 film and television scores, in addition to many songs.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: So I got the gig to play with Michel Legrand the second week at uh Live, we did an album called Live at Jimmy’s... Michel Legrand wrote a thing called “Images” for me and that won a Grammy.
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Dan Morgenstern
about_quotes.evidence: There would be a kicker headline on the cover, saying “Bechet Plays like a Pig: Michel Legrand.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Dan Morgenstern — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Findley
about_quotes.evidence: And then Miles Davis, another one. I saw him in New York. You know we didn’t get to hang, it was a different situation. That was when I did the album “Dingo” with Miles. ... So Michel Legrand says to me, “Chuck come in here, I want you to hear — you have to be this person. ... I’m on every other tra
about_quotes.doc_title: Chuck Findley interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 6, 2023

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Clarke
about_quotes.evidence: He says, 'Well, my uncle Henan Jacques Eliam (PHONETIC), is forming an orchestra. He's going to play nothing but jazz.' ... Two weeks later I had a contract from his uncle, and that was like in August, in September I was gone.

about_quotes.speaker: Phil Woods
about_quotes.evidence: So I got the second week at Jimmy’s, and they were recording live and we did “You Must Believe in Spring.” ... So I was actually saved from going back to France by Michel Legrand
about_quotes.doc_title: Phil Woods interviewed by Monk Rowe, Delaware Water Gap, PA, November 8, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: Pierre Boussaguet
about_quotes.evidence: it has been ten years of, most of the time, always a challenge... I play electric bass with two guys in my life: Lalo Schifrin or Michel Legrand.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pierre Boussaguet interviewed by Matthieu Jaffre, Aix en Provence, France, July 28, 2020
